ASCI.suggested_fix: Remove the absolute superlative or add verifiable substantiation (e.g. cite the test/study).
Qualify the claim or remove the absolute guarantee.

TRAI.explanation: False urgency / pressure tactic in commercial communication.
TRAI.suggested_fix: Remove artificial urgency or state a genuine, dated offer period.

BIS.explanation: Energy or certification claim requires a valid IS/BEE reference.
BIS.suggested_fix: Attach the IS certification number or BEE star-rating reference.

DPDP.explanation: Reference to using or sharing personal data without a clear consent notice.
DPDP.suggested_fix: Add an explicit notice of purpose and a consent/opt-out mechanism before using personal data.

DPDP.explanation: Implied or pre-ticked consent — consent must be free, specific, and affirmative.
DPDP.suggested_fix: Remove pre-ticked/auto-enrolment language; require an explicit opt-in action.
